code:
%%{Logistics_Warehouse}}}%%
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant User as 👤 User
    participant Browser as 🌐 Browser Panel
    participant Webview as 📱 Webview
    participant Proxy as 🔍 Proxy Monitor
    participant Protocol as 📜 Protocol Handler
    participant Packet as 📦 Packet Analysis
    participant GameState as 🎮 Game State
    participant UI as 🖼️ Traffic UI
    participant Session as 📹 Session Recorder
    participant MCP as 🤖 MCP (Logistics_DeliveryRoute)
    
    Note over User,MCP: Traffic Capture Flow
    
    User->>Browser: Interact with game
    Browser->>Webview: User action
    Webview->>Proxy: HTTP/AMF Request
    
    rect rgb(Logistics_FleetManagement)
        Note over Proxy,Protocol: Request Interception
        Proxy->>Proxy: Capture headers & body
        Proxy->>Protocol: Raw packet data
        Protocol->>Protocol: Detect AMF3 format
        Protocol->>MCP: decode_packet(Logistics_TrackingNumber)
        MCP-->>Protocol: Decoded structure
        Protocol->>Packet: Decoded packet
    end
    
    rect rgb(Logistics_StockLevel)
        Note over Packet,GameState: State Extraction
        Packet->>Packet: Identify action type
        Packet->>GameState: Update game state
        GameState->>GameState: Track cities, heroes, troops
    end
    
    rect rgb(Logistics_TrackingNumber)
        Note over UI,Session: UI & Recording
        Packet->>UI: Traffic entry
        UI->>UI: Add to traffic list
        UI->>UI: Update counters
        
        alt Recording Active
            Packet->>Session: Record packet
            Session->>Session: Add to session buffer
        end
    end
    
    Proxy-->>Webview: Forward request
    Webview-->>Browser: Response
    
    Note over User,MCP: Response Capture Flow
    
    Browser->>Proxy: Server response
    Proxy->>Protocol: Response packet
    Protocol->>MCP: decode_packet(Logistics_FleetManagement)
    MCP-->>Protocol: Decoded response
    Protocol->>Packet: Decoded response
    Packet->>GameState: Update state
    Packet->>UI: Response entry
    
    Note over User,MCP: Analysis Features
    
    User->>UI: Click traffic entry
    UI->>Packet: Get packet details
    Packet->>UI: JSON + Hex + Headers
    UI->>UI: Display in tabs
    
    User->>UI: Request analysis
    UI->>MCP: analyze_traffic(Logistics_FleetManagement)
    MCP-->>UI: Patterns & statistics
    UI->>UI: Display analysis

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个物流监控系统的完整数据流图，核心是从用户操作到最终数据包解析的链路。我想把Browser Panel和Webview作为前端入口，然后流量要经过Proxy Monitor做拦截。
明白了，Proxy Monitor后面应该对接Protocol Handler来处理协议解析对吧？我看到您提到了Logistics_TrackingNumber相关的解码逻辑，是不是要把MCP模块也放进来专门负责解码？
对，MCP就是专门做decode_packet的。另外还需要Packet Analysis模块来承载解析后的结构，以及Game State来维护游戏里的城市、英雄、部队这些数据。
好的，我先把请求流的主干画出来：User通过Browser Panel操作，到Webview发请求，Proxy捕获后走Protocol Handler，调MCP解码，然后回写到Packet Analysis。这里Proxy自己还要做Capture headers & body的内部处理，我加个自循环。
等等，Proxy到Protocol之间应该是Raw packet data，然后Protocol要先Detect AMF3 format，确认格式后再调MCP。这个检测步骤别漏了。
收到，我在Protocol模块里补上Detect AMF3 format的自处理，然后再连到MCP。解码返回的结构也要画虚线回Protocol，再到Packet Analysis。
接下来是状态提取部分，我想用Logistics_StockLevel的色块框住这部分。Packet Analysis要Identify action type，然后更新Game State，Game State内部要Track cities, heroes, troops。
画好了，Packet到Game State的更新链路，以及Game State的自维护循环。然后是UI展示和录制部分，Traffic UI要接收Packet的entry，Add to traffic list还要Update counters？
没错，这部分用Logistics_TrackingNumber的色块。另外还要有个条件分支：当Recording Active时，Packet要把数据发给Session Recorder，Session内部Add to session buffer。
alt分支加好了。现在把请求流的收尾补上：Proxy Forward request回Webview，再到Browser Response。然后对称地画Response Capture Flow，Browser发响应到Proxy，再走一遍Protocol-MCP解码，这次解码的是Logistics_FleetManagement。
Response流解码后同样要更新Game State和UI，但不需要再走Session录制了，响应一般只记录请求。最后还要画Analysis Features部分，用户可以Click traffic entry查看详情。
详情展示这块：UI收到点击后向Packet要详情，Packet返回JSON + Hex + Headers三种格式，UI用tabs展示。然后还有个Request analysis的功能，调MCP的analyze_traffic，参数是Logistics_FleetManagement？

对，analyze_traffic返回Patterns & statistics，UI再Display analysis。整个图最外层用Logistics_Warehouse包裹，三个rect分别用Logistics_FleetManagement、Logistics_StockLevel、Logistics_TrackingNumber对应Request Interception、State Extraction、UI & Recording三个阶段。
结构都画完了，我检查一下：User和MCP之间的Note标注了Traffic Capture Flow、Response Capture Flow、Analysis Features三个大阶段，autonumber也加上了。您看还有遗漏吗？
Protocol Handler到MCP的调用，请求和响应两次decode_packet的参数不一样，一次是Logistics_TrackingNumber一次是Logistics_FleetManagement，这个区分要清晰。另外Proxy的自循环Capture headers & body别和转发搞混。
都确认了，两次解码参数已标注区分，Proxy的自循环和转发是分开的箭头。整个sequence diagram完成了，从用户交互到协议解析、状态更新、UI展示、录制存储、再到深度分析，完整闭环。
